assertions.title: First visit full experience

steps.expected: Page loads with dark cyberpunk theme
steps.observed: Page loaded. Initial CSS 404 due to stale dev server cache; resolved after browser cache clear and hard reload. Dark cyberpunk theme (deep purple bg, scanlines, vignette) rendered correctly.

steps.expected: Map, EVA chrome, and markers all visible
steps.observed: EVA UI chrome fully rendered. Map stuck on 'INITIALIZING MAP SYSTEM...' loading state due to WebGL unavailability in headless Chrome (known limitation).

Header present: [data-testid='nerv-header'], text 'BUSHWICK // MAP', fixed position, top-left, z-index 20, NERV Orange border with neon glow. Framer Motion initial animation (opacity 0→1) did not trigger in headless Chrome, but DOM structure and styling correct.
Scanlines element found: class 'scanlines pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-10', covers full viewport, pointer-events: none.
Vignette element found: class 'crt-vignette pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-10', covers full viewport, pointer-events: none.
Data readout present: [data-testid='data-readout'], fixed bottom-left, z-index 20, showing 'LAT 40.6944 LNG -73.9213 ZOOM 15.00', font-family: Share Tech Mono.
Hex grid SVG present: pattern#hexagons with Entry Plug Green (#58F2A5) strokes, parent div visible, pointer-events: none.

steps.action: Check DOM for map container and markers
steps.expected: MapLibre map and markers present (known limitation: may be blank canvas)
steps.observed: MapLibre GL map did not load (no .maplibregl-map element, no canvas). Dynamic import stuck at loading state. This is expected: WebGL is unavailable in headless Chrome, so MapLibre initialization fails. 0 markers present.

steps.action: Verify no visual conflicts in z-index layering
steps.expected: All layers positioned correctly without conflicts
steps.observed: Correct layering: header z-20, scanlines z-10, vignette z-10, readout z-20. Main overflow:hidden. Overlay pointer-events:none. No conflicts.
No console errors after clean page load.

evidence.network: HTML page -> 200. Initial load had stale CSS/JS chunk 404s from dev server version mismatch; resolved after browser cache clear.

domChecks.scanlines: present, fixed, pointer-events:none, z-10, covers viewport
domChecks.vignette: present, fixed, pointer-events:none, z-10, covers viewport
domChecks.dataReadout: present, fixed, bottom-left, z-20, Share Tech Mono font
domChecks.mapContainer: NOT loaded (WebGL limitation in headless Chrome)

assertions.issues: MapLibre GL map does not load in headless Chrome (WebGL unavailable) — this is the known pre-existing limitation documented in AGENTS.md. Framer Motion entrance animation on header does not trigger in headless Chrome (opacity stays at 0); DOM and styling are correct when forced visible.

assertions.title: Mobile responsive across views

steps.observed: Page loaded with full dark cyberpunk theme at 375x812.
Header is 343x42px (uses responsive classes: left-4 right-4 on mobile vs left-6 right-auto on desktop). Right edge at 339px, fits within 375px viewport. No overflow.

steps.expected: Data readout visible and not overflowing
steps.observed: Data readout is 104x70px, positioned bottom-left (16px from left, 796px bottom). Font size 16px (responsive). Fits within viewport, no overflow.
Main element is 375x812, exactly matching viewport. fillsViewport: true.

steps.expected: Markers on map (known limitation: map may not render)
steps.observed: 0 markers (MapLibre GL did not load due to WebGL limitation). Map area shows 'INITIALIZING MAP SYSTEM...' centered.
scrollWidth = 375 = viewport width. No horizontal overflow. noHorizontalOverflow: true.

steps.expected: Scanlines, vignette, hex grid all render at mobile
steps.observed: All three present: scanlines ✓, vignette ✓, hexGrid ✓.

assertions.issues: MapLibre GL map does not load at mobile viewport either (same WebGL limitation). Header Framer Motion animation does not trigger in headless Chrome (opacity stays at 0); when forced visible, header renders correctly with responsive mobile styling spanning near-full width.

frictions.description: Initial page loads returned 404 for critical CSS/JS chunks (layout.css, main-app.js, app-pages-internals.js, page.js) due to Next.js dev server version mismatch with stale browser cache. Required browser cache clear and hard reload to resolve.
frictions.resolution: Cleared browser caches via JS eval and performed hard reload (location.reload(true)). CSS and JS loaded correctly on subsequent navigation.

frictions.description: Framer Motion entrance animations (opacity 0→1, translateX -20→0) on NervHeader component do not trigger in headless Chrome. Header remains at initial state (opacity: 0, transform: translateX(-20px)).
frictions.resolution: Manually forced header.style.opacity='1' and header.style.transform='none' via JS eval to verify header styling and layout for screenshots. DOM structure and CSS are correct.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-001 (first visit full experience): All EVA UI chrome elements (NERV header, scanlines, vignette, data readout, hex grid) present with correct positioning, z-index layering, and dark cyberpunk styling. No console errors. Map/markers not rendered due to known WebGL headless Chrome limitation. VAL-CROSS-004 (mobile responsive): At 375x812, header adapts to near-full-width, data readout adapts, main fills viewport, no horizontal overflow, all overlays present. Both assertions pass with the documented WebGL limitation noted.
